metaTitle: For Orthopaedic Surgeons | Avana Surgical Systems
metaDescription: Premium bracing, cold therapy, and surgical systems for Indian orthopaedic surgeons. Trusted brands, fitting support, and patient education resources.

hero.title: Equipment your patients deserve. Support you can rely on.
hero.description: Avana partners with Indian orthopaedic and spine surgeons to provide clinically-proven bracing, cold therapy, and surgical systems — backed by training, fitting support, and pan-India patient logistics.

conditionsHeading.title: What Avana offers your practice
conditionsHeading.lead: We support Indian surgeons end-to-end — from product training to patient delivery.

conditions.title: Surgeon training & CME
conditions.description: Workshops, cadaver labs, and continuing medical education on the latest bracing and minimally invasive systems.

conditions.title: Patient fitting support
conditions.description: Our clinical team handles complex fittings — particularly for scoliosis, post-op rigid bracing, and spinal orthoses.

conditions.title: Pan-India patient logistics
conditions.description: When you prescribe, your patient gets the product. Osteokart dispatches across India in 3–5 business days.

conditions.title: Premium global brands
conditions.description: Exclusive access to Breg, Aspen Medical, RiwoSpine, and Spinamic — the same equipment leading global centres use.

productsHeading.title: Featured surgical solutions
productsHeading.lead: A selection of the systems most commonly used by our surgeon partners. Full catalogue available on Osteokart.

testimonials.name: Dr. (anonymised)
testimonials.testimonial: Spinamic has given us a meaningful non-surgical option for adolescent scoliosis patients in the Indian context — and the fitting support from the Avana team is excellent.

seoContent.title: Why surgeons partner with Avana
seoContent.intro: We focus on three things: premium products, technical support, and reliable patient logistics — so you can focus on patient care.

sections.heading: Premium global brands, India-ready
sections.body: We bring world-class brands to Indian operating theatres and clinics with India-appropriate pricing, sizing, and after-sales support. No more guesswork on availability or replacements.

sections.heading: Training that fits your schedule
sections.body: From product orientation sessions at your clinic to hands-on workshops and CME events, our medical team works around your practice. Tell us what your team needs.

sections.heading: Logistics that don't fall on you
sections.body: Once you've prescribed, the rest is on us. Osteokart dispatches across India, our specialists handle fittings, and our clinical team supports your patient through their recovery.

faq.question: How does Avana support fitting in remote cities?
faq.answer: Most of our bracing is fittable by our specialists via virtual consultation combined with at-home measurement guidance. For complex cases (scoliosis, rigid post-op braces), our team travels for in-person fittings in tier-2 and tier-3 cities.

faq.question: Do you offer surgeon training events?
faq.answer: Yes — we run workshops, cadaver labs, and CME events across India in partnership with our brand principals. Get in touch about upcoming events in your city.

faq.question: How do I refer a patient?
faq.answer: Send them to Osteokart.com with your prescription, or contact our clinical team directly via info@avanasurgical.com and we will coordinate the fitting.

cta.title: Partner with Avana.
cta.description: Tell us about your practice — we'll arrange a product walkthrough and discuss how we can support your patients.
cta.disclaimer: Avana works with practising orthopaedic and spine surgeons across India.
